candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above operating profit and specifically tied to investment property/rental operations, so it most plausibly sits alongside rather than inside the selected COGS bucket built from property management/construction/direct cost rows.
Separate operating D&A line above operating profit, but not explicitly tied to cost of sales; could relate to overhead instead of direct operating costs.
Separate operating D&A line above operating profit, but without a COGS-specific label; lease depreciation could belong to SG&A or mixed functions.
Separate operating amortization line above operating profit, but intangible amortization is more often overhead/administrative than direct COGS here.
Balancing row, not an economic expense line; should not be selected unless needed to complete a summary, which is not appropriate here.

variables.notes: Used only the operating section above financial items. Ignored the broader row 'Depreciation/amortization and impairment' because it mixes impairment with D&A. Selected only the property-specific depreciation line for COGS because it is the clearest separate operating D&A item linked to the rental/investment-property cost bucket and appears outside the previously selected direct-cost rows.

candidates.why: Separate operating depreciation line above operating profit and not explicitly tied to COGS; most plausibly belongs with overhead/administrative functions relative to the selected SG&A component rows.
Separate operating D&A line above operating profit; absent a COGS-specific tag, lease-related depreciation is more plausibly part of SG&A/overhead than the selected direct cost rows.
Separate operating amortization line above operating profit and typically associated with administrative/overhead functions rather than direct construction/property operating costs.
Although separate and above operating profit, it is specifically linked to investment property and is better aligned to rental/property operating costs than SG&A.
Balancing row, not a real standalone expense row; should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected only separate operating D&A rows that appear outside the previously chosen SG&A component rows. Excluded 'Depreciation - Investment Property' as more naturally attributable to rental/property operating costs, and excluded the balancing line. No R&D row is visible, so there is no special XRD interaction to apply.
